summary: Web ilova Telegram Mini App sifatida ham ishlaydigan qilindi (initData HMAC tekshiruvi + Credentials("telegram-miniapp") auto-login, /app buyrug'i, menyu tugmasi) va desktop/mobil responsive shell (sidebar<->bottom-nav) qo'shildi; sprint fayllari, CLAUDE.md qarorlar jurnali va dashboard.html shu holatga moslab yangilandi.
